_comment: SHARED mapping: Dreame events => top-down RELATIVE-steering keys (GTA2-style). GTA2/GTA1 use tank controls -- forward = accelerate in the current facing, left/right = steer/rotate -- NOT absolute 8-way. So this IGNORES heading and holds FORWARD while steering on the vacuum's turn events. The 'keys' block is THIS setup's emulator keys (per-game/emulator config): GTA2-on-PSX via DuckStation has S=accelerate (PSX X), A=reverse (PSX Square), arrows=steer. Edit 'keys' to match your binding. Tune: raise/lower the turn pulse ms for sharper/softer steering; lower events.TURN_DEG for more frequent steering input.
